smart-cleanup.description: Run health monitor with forced disk-high cleanup flow

web-fetch.description: Fetch web content and summarize (optional: URL as first arg)

daily-brief.description: Fetch tech headlines and send daily brief to Telegram (graceful skip if env missing)

system-status.description: Collect system status (temp/memory/load/disk) and send to Telegram (graceful skip if env missing)

trade-analyst.description: Analyze YM=F 15m with technical indicators, run paper trades in SQLite, and send Telegram summary

report-generator.description: Generate Excel report from data/trade_logs.json and auto-send to Telegram (graceful skip if env missing)
